description: Router-only multi-target single-turn suite for the medium catalog (250 subtask evaluations).

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #1: complete these intents in order: (1) extracts structured data from a given URL using a prompt to describe the data and fields to extract; (2) list all projects on your Aiven account; (3) list all services in a specific Aiven project; (4) validates an OpenAPI file using APIMatic’s API and returns a validation summary; (5) provides a lightweight wrapper around OpenTelemetry primitives with Phoenix-aware defaults

subtasks.tool_intent: extracts structured data from a given URL using a prompt to describe the data and fields to extract
list all projects on your Aiven account
list all services in a specific Aiven project
validates an OpenAPI file using APIMatic’s API and returns a validation summary
provides a lightweight wrapper around OpenTelemetry primitives with Phoenix-aware defaults

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #2: complete these intents in order: (1) mCP server implementation for Arize Phoenix providing a unified interface to Phoenix's capabilities; (2) update an existing collection in the database; (3) delete a collection from the database; (4) retrieves available baseline audiences, optionally filtered by country; (5) retrieves the list of available affinity categories that can be used in influencer comparisons

subtasks.tool_intent: mCP server implementation for Arize Phoenix providing a unified interface to Phoenix's capabilities
update an existing collection in the database
delete a collection from the database
retrieves available baseline audiences, optionally filtered by country
retrieves the list of available affinity categories that can be used in influencer comparisons

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #3: complete these intents in order: (1) list all S3 buckets in my AWS account; (2) get content recommendations for AWS documentation pages; (3) execute APL queries against Axiom datasets; (4) list available Axiom datasets; (5) samples rows from a Kusto table

subtasks.tool_intent: list all S3 buckets in my AWS account
get content recommendations for AWS documentation pages
execute APL queries against Axiom datasets
list available Axiom datasets
samples rows from a Kusto table
subtasks.expected_tool_key: Azure::Sample rows from a Kusto table

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #4: complete these intents in order: (1) lists, creates, and retrieves keys within an Azure Key Vault; (2) list Release Management installable artifacts of a connected app; (3) changes whether public install page should be available for the installable artifact; (4) ask Box AI about a hub; (5) list all Doc Gen jobs that used a specific template

subtasks.tool_intent: lists, creates, and retrieves keys within an Azure Key Vault
list Release Management installable artifacts of a connected app
changes whether public install page should be available for the installable artifact
ask Box AI about a hub
list all Doc Gen jobs that used a specific template

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #5: complete these intents in order: (1) read a Chroma document by document id; (2) update existing documents' content, metadata, or embeddings; (3) retrieves the status of the latest pipeline for a given branch; (4) identifies flaky tests in a CircleCI project by analyzing test execution history; (5) lists and filters code quality issues in a repository

subtasks.tool_intent: read a Chroma document by document id
update existing documents' content, metadata, or embeddings
retrieves the status of the latest pipeline for a given branch
identifies flaky tests in a CircleCI project by analyzing test execution history
lists and filters code quality issues in a repository

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #6: complete these intents in order: (1) get repository with analysis information, including metrics for Grade, Issues, Duplication, Complexi; (2) analyzes impacts between code and database entities; (3) pulls an impact assessment from the CodeLogic server's APIs for the specified code method and class; (4) track and analyze trace data; (5) organize and manage projects

subtasks.tool_intent: get repository with analysis information, including metrics for Grade, Issues, Duplication, Complexity, and Coverage
analyzes impacts between code and database entities
pulls an impact assessment from the CodeLogic server's APIs for the specified code method and class
track and analyze trace data
organize and manage projects

cases.user_intent: Single user turn #7: complete these intents in order: (1) delete a document by ID from a specified scope and collection; (2) get a document by ID from a specified scope and collection; (3) get information about the user's space, including available assignees, dartboards, folders, statuses; (4) create a new doc with title, text content, and folder; (5) updates an existing blog post's title and/or content
